name: Toast
description: Ephemeral notification that appears and disappears automatically. Supports variants and can be triggered imperatively via useToast.

variant.description: Visual style: default, success, warning, error

icon.description: Icon name to display alongside the toast

examples.name: Basic toast usage
examples.code:
const { toast } = useToast();
toast({ title: "Saved", description: "Your changes have been saved." });

examples.name: Error toast
examples.code: toast({ title: "Error", variant: "error", description: "Something went wrong." });
